name: AlphaEvolve
headline: AlphaEvolve, powered by Gemini, is driving impact across business, infrastructure, and science.
one_line_judgment: Highlights broad applicability of Gemini-powered coding agents, but lacks concrete new release.
official_claims: AlphaEvolve's Gemini-powered algorithms are impacting multiple fields.
user_scenarios: Applying coding agents to business process automation
Using AI agents in scientific research

bad: No new technical details or releases.

relevance_to_us: Shows the expanding reach of agentic AI, but lacks actionable updates for product teams.
summary_zh: Google DeepMind 介绍 AlphaEvolve（Gemini 驱动）在商业、基础设施和科研领域的应用影响
key_points_zh: Gemini 算法赋能多领域智能体；强调跨行业应用潜力
scenarios_zh: AI 工程师可参考智能体在业务自动化和科研中的应用；产品经理关注跨行业落地案例
business_model_zh: 暂无具体商业模式信息
feedback_zh: 正面：展示 AI 智能体跨领域影响力；负面：缺乏新技术细节或产品更新
judgment_zh: 更多为案例宣传，实际技术更新有限
relevance_zh: 为团队提供智能体跨行业应用的参考，但缺乏可落地的新信息
official_zh: AlphaEvolve 的 Gemini 算法正在推动多领域影响
community_zh: 社区关注实际应用案例，但期待更多技术细节

name: Google AI Mode in Search
headline: Google highlights AI Mode, Search Live, and Shopping features for gardening tips in Search.
one_line_judgment: Showcases consumer-facing AI features, but no new technical release.
official_claims: Google Search offers AI-powered gardening tips via AI Mode and Shopping.
user_scenarios: Consumers using AI-powered search for gardening advice
Shopping for gardening products via AI recommendations

good: Demonstrates practical AI in consumer search.
bad: No new product or model for developers.

relevance_to_us: Limited relevance for AI product teams; more of a consumer feature showcase.
summary_zh: Google 展示 Search AI Mode、Search Live 与 Shopping 功能在园艺场景下的应用
key_points_zh: AI Mode 支持园艺知识问答；结合购物推荐，提升用户体验
scenarios_zh: AI 工程师可参考消费级 AI 搜索场景；产品经理关注用户端 AI 体验
business_model_zh: 基于 Google Search 平台，免费使用
feedback_zh: 正面：AI 场景落地直观；负面：对开发者无新功能开放
judgment_zh: 偏消费端展示，对工程团队参考价值有限
relevance_zh: 主要为消费级应用展示，技术团队可关注用户体验创新
official_zh: Google Search 通过 AI Mode 和 Shopping 提供园艺建议
community_zh: 社区关注 AI 搜索实际应用场景

name: Future Vision Film Competition
headline: Google partners with XPRIZE and Range Media Partners on the $3.5 million Future Vision film competition.
one_line_judgment: Promotes AI-driven creativity in film, but not a technical product update.
official_claims: Google is a partner in the $3.5 million Future Vision film competition.
user_scenarios: Filmmakers using AI tools for creative projects
AI teams exploring media and entertainment applications

good: Encourages AI adoption in creative industries.
bad: Not a technical release or update.

relevance_to_us: Relevant for teams interested in AI and media, but not a direct product or model update.
summary_zh: Google 联合 XPRIZE 与 Range Media Partners 推出 350 万美元 Future Vision AI 电影竞赛
key_points_zh: 推动 AI 在影视创意领域应用；高额奖金激励创新；多方合作提升行业影响力

feedback_zh: 正面：促进 AI 创意落地；负面：无直接产品或技术更新
judgment_zh: 适合关注 AI 创意与多模态内容的团队参考
relevance_zh: 为 AI 团队提供跨界创新与内容生成的机会参考

community_zh: 社区关注 AI 在影视内容生成领域的创新潜力

name: Google AI April 2026 Updates
headline: Google recaps its latest AI updates from April 2026.

user_scenarios: Staying informed on Google's AI ecosystem

good: Provides overview of recent AI activities.

relevance_to_us: Useful for tracking overall trends, but lacks concrete updates for product teams.

name: Gemini API Webhooks
headline: Google introduces event-driven Webhooks in Gemini API to reduce latency for long-running jobs.
one_line_judgment: Enables push-based notifications, improving efficiency for asynchronous AI workflows.
official_claims: Webhooks eliminate the need for inefficient polling in Gemini API.
real_change_notes: Added event-driven Webhooks to Gemini API.
core_positioning: Improves developer experience for handling long-running AI tasks.
user_scenarios: Developers receiving real-time notifications for AI job completion

bad: Requires developers to update integration logic.

relevance_to_us: Directly relevant for AI product teams building on Gemini API, enabling more responsive applications.
summary_zh: Google Gemini API 推出事件驱动 Webhooks，显著降低长任务延迟并提升开发效率
key_points_zh: 支持推送式通知，替代轮询机制；提升长任务处理效率；简化异步工作流集成
scenarios_zh: AI 工程师可用 Webhook 实现实时任务回调；产品经理可提升产品响应速度
business_model_zh: 基于 Gemini API，按调用计费
feedback_zh: 正面：极大降低延迟，提高开发体验；负面：需调整现有集成逻辑
judgment_zh: Webhooks 是提升异步 AI 应用体验的重要基础设施
relevance_zh: 为 AI 团队开发高效异步应用提供关键能力
official_zh: Gemini API Webhooks 消除了低效轮询，提升异步任务处理效率
community_zh: 社区积极评价 Webhook 对开发体验的提升

good: Focus on correctness in RL model development.

name: Benchmaxxer Repellant on Open ASR Leaderboard
headline: Benchmaxxer Repellant added to the Open ASR Leaderboard to address private data concerns.
one_line_judgment: Addresses leaderboard integrity by mitigating private data leakage.
real_change_notes: Benchmaxxer Repellant added to leaderboard evaluation.
core_positioning: Improves fairness and transparency in ASR benchmarking.
user_scenarios: Researchers submitting ASR models for public benchmarking
Teams concerned with data privacy in leaderboard evaluations

bad: No direct impact on model performance.

relevance_to_us: Relevant for teams benchmarking ASR models and concerned with evaluation fairness.
summary_zh: Open ASR Leaderboard 新增 Benchmaxxer Repellant，提升评测数据隐私与榜单公正性
key_points_zh: 防止私有数据泄漏影响榜单结果；提升 ASR 评测透明度与可信度
scenarios_zh: AI 工程师可更放心提交 ASR 模型评测；产品经理关注榜单公正性
feedback_zh: 正面：提升评测公正性；负面：对模型性能无直接影响
judgment_zh: 榜单机制优化有助于行业健康发展
relevance_zh: 为关注 ASR 评测和数据隐私的团队提供参考
official_zh: Open ASR Leaderboard 引入 Benchmaxxer Repellant，提升数据隐私与榜单公正性
community_zh: 社区认可榜单机制优化，关注评测透明度

name: Together AI Efficient Inference Research
headline: Together AI shares foundational research on powering efficient inference at scale for AI-native teams.
one_line_judgment: Addresses the challenge of scalable, efficient model inference for production AI.
official_claims: Research focuses on running models efficiently, reliably, and at scale.
core_positioning: Provides insights for teams moving from research to production AI.
user_scenarios: Product teams scaling AI models to production

bad: No specific product or model release.

relevance_to_us: Relevant for teams focused on efficient, scalable AI inference in production environments.
summary_zh: Together AI 发布高效大规模推理基础研究，助力 AI 团队提升生产级模型部署能力
key_points_zh: 聚焦高效、可靠、可扩展的模型推理；为 AI 团队提供生产落地经验

judgment_zh: 为生产级 AI 推理提供有价值的研究参考
